name: Collapsed Passage
description: A passage lined with torches. The light flickers against a wall of jagged stone and rubble that blocks the way east. The only way out is back west. {{passage_desc}}
ambient: Dust motes dance in the torchlight.
Somewhere behind the collapse, water drips steadily.

objects.name: loose stone
objects.description: A stone that looks slightly out of place, as if it could be moved.
objects.description_snippet: A loose stone sits near the rubble pile.

on_interact.move: You shove the stone aside. A small metal lever is revealed, set into a crack in the wall.
on_interact.look: A rough stone, worn smooth on one side.
on_interact.search: You find nothing else under the stone.

objects.name: hidden lever
objects.description: A small metal lever embedded in the rock, covered in dust.

on_interact.pull: You pull the lever. With a grinding rumble, part of the rubble shifts, creating a narrow gap to the east.

interaction_rules.text: You shove the stone aside. A small metal lever is revealed, set into a crack in the wall.
You pull the lever. With a grinding rumble, part of the rubble shifts, creating a narrow gap to the east.
